author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Freeze BDC CLI v1 behavior as the non-negotiable regression baseline and document its known limitations and canonical failure cases before any v2 work starts.
research_question: What exactly does BDC CLI v1 do today, where does it fail, and which benchmark fixtures must remain available for all later v2 comparisons?
tests_required: snapshot tests for current v1 outputs on at least 5 benchmark cases
regression test confirming TextAI_Auto still fails under v1 in the currently known way
fixture integrity test for frozen v1 benchmark packets and outputs
definition_of_done: minimum five golden v1 outputs captured
